items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this scenario or its expected outcomes. The prior steps focus on various aspects of booking and recovery workflows but do not include any specific tests or validations related to the change in group size. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
